name: Bay Road Tennis Club and MultiSport Center
description: Bay Road Tennis Club and MultiSport Center is a place to play pickleball in Amherst, MA. There are 16 hard courts. 8 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — $10 indoor guest fee, $5 outdoor guest fee

name: Belchertown Recreation Department
description: Come play pickleball at Belchertown Recreation Department in Belchertown, MA! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Buttery brook park
description: Buttery brook park is a place to play pickleball in South Hadley, MA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Chesterfield Ma
description: Chesterfield Ma is a place to play pickleball in Westhampton, MA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Gateway Regional Schools
description: Gateway Regional Schools is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huntington, MA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Harbour View Park
description: Harbour View Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Huntington, MA. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Hatfield Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Hatfield Elementary School in Hatfield, MA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.
open_play_schedule: You must sign up on TeamReach: 01038SA
fees: Private — Optional donations. Suggested donation of $2-3 per day, or $20 for 6 months. Donations are used for supplies and contributions to the school.

name: Hatfield Rally House
description: Hatfield Rally House is a place to play pickleball in Hatfield, MA. There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Look Memorial Park Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Look Memorial Park Tennis Center in Northampton, MA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
